review_text:
We came for 4 nights and stayed in one of the cabins. The cabin was quite spacious, clean and had everything we needed for our little break.
The spa and pool were perfect!
I needed a couple of things from the housekeepers and they were very helpful. I went to the reception and again they were very helpful and friendly specially a lovely lady named Kim.
Beautiful location. We went to the beach, bike rides and lunch out.
We will definitely be back!
Extremely well maintained caravan park, amenities excellence party recommended
We are in a van not a cabin

Sehr schön angelegter Campingplatz mit gepflegten Pflanzen und sehr schönen Palmen. Schönes & sauberes Pool. Unser Ensuit hat toll ausgesehen, aber sie heizem bei sehr warmen Wetter schnell auf und es wir unerträglich heiß. Es verfügt keine Lüftung und kein Fenster, wie auch keine Duschkabine. Würde hier kein Ensuit buchen. Wir haben die schönen neueren Sanitären Anlagen benutzt- die Duschen dort waren super & sauber. Die Damen am Empfang sehr nett.

I've only just arrived (in horrible weather) and already feel so welcome. Erin in reception is amazing. So easy and helpful to deal with on the phone prior and an absolute joy to speak with in person.

Seems like an awesome park. The warm hospitality has me comfortable and ready to enjoy my stay!

Nice park
We stayed on the permanent grass drive through site with our caravan ..
Quiet location
Lovely walks along beach or cliff top plus the bike way that connects Ballina and Lennox Heads.
Heads up you do need a car to access those closest towns ..
Ballina or Lennox Heads.
Caravan park

Stayed at Tasman holiday park for two weeks great park amenities are spotless , grounds immaculately maintained great size park .office staff very approachable and happy to help in any way they can
10 min drive from the beach supermarket approximately 10 min by car road our bikes to the beach 5-10 min beautiful beaches 20 min drive from Byron bay

We recently stayed in an ensuite van site and thoroughly enjoyed it. Great facilities and  the kids in the park seemed to enjoy the playground and pool etc. And the service was very friendly. Definitely will be back!
Good size caravan park, amenities are clean.

Fantastic family caravan park! Such a great family atmosphere especially on the caravan sites. Very tranquil and welcoming. The amenities are so spacious and clean. Such a great location without feeling too busy! Have already booked for next year we loved it so much. Thank you
Great park so clean. Cabins were well stocked and pristine.  Staff were so friendly (Kim) was especially attentive to all our needs nothing was a problem. Made our holiday. Thank you Tasman

We camped here in our little caravan. Beautiful park with good facilities and in a great location. We have been walking to the beach and it's an easy drive to major shops in Ballina and also great walk to Lennox head for some great dinning. Had a great relaxing time and beautiful beaches and swimming. As well as fishing and surfing.

I stayed here for five days.

Unfortunately, there was mould on the bedding. The dryer was not working the entire time, which was very inconvenient. Because of this, I had to ask for things to be done — to check the dryer, change the towels and bedding, and vacuum the room. I asked as politely as I could, but the staff member handled the situation without any apology or genuine effort to resolve it.

The staff member said they would let their manager know once the manager returned, but I never heard anything back. I was also told that the cost of using a coin laundromat would be covered. However, when I asked at reception, I was told I would need to give cash to get coins. After paying fully for the accommodation, should I really have to drive outside, spend my own time, and use my own money to dry clothes because the dryer didn’t work? During what was meant to be a nice holiday, I lost time, spent extra money, and felt stressed.

When I explained this calmly, the staff member (Kim) did not apologise. Instead, I was asked whether I had laundry and was given $6 in coins. The issue was never about the money, it was about the attitude. We were eight people on a summer holiday, already on day four. Of course there was laundry. I wasn’t asking because I needed $6, and I didn’t even need to take it. Just as I was about to go out, the power went out. Since I was already heading out, I stopped by reception to report the power outage and mention again that the dryer was still not working.
Ballina itself is beautiful, but unfortunately the staff’s attitude at this accommodation ruined the mood of the holiday.

What started as a booking based on the incredible amenities, shower pressure, and great location, led to so much more. Such caring friendly staff, friendly community/residents, and spacious cabins suitable for families of all sizes. Big 4 Tasman holiday parks Ballina you truly are remarkable!

If I could go 6 stars I absolutely would!!!!!
Looking forward to coming back soon.
Great pool and playground for the kids in a quiet park

We were very impressed with this park. The caravan sites were very generous and even in school holidays it didn’t feel busy, in fact it was lovely and quiet. The kids zone is fantastic, our children were playing there for ages and it catered for different ages. Facilities were clean and well maintained. We are keeping this one for a return visit.
Fantastic location. Friendly and helpful staff.  Definitely recommend!

Well kept cabins that were clean and comfortable, with great facilities.
The pool, spa, kids play areas and the surroundings were also well maintained and clean.

A quiet, peaceful park with clean amenities, tidy grounds and a pool & spa. Even though it was mostly cabins and residents, the atmosphere was friendly and welcoming. The office ladies were super lovely, too! Convenient location and close to Lennox and Byron Bay. We really enjoyed our stay.
Fantastic family cabin x3 B. With all what you need to survive for a week, away from home!
Our first visit, cabin was spotless,close to pool,staff very courteous & friendly. Maybe a little out of Ballina for shops etc but still a great park & will be back.
Amazing,very clean,great pool & services to use like washing machine,cart hire for the kids,waliking distance to parks & the beach is close by,by driving up the road.Cant wait to go back.
Brilliantly exceptional park, great sites and the best amenities we’ve had yet. Short walk to the beach and the surrounding areas are beautiful.

Great park. We stayed ina 3 bedroom cabin with ensuite. Lovely and clean. Good playground for kids and swimming pool. Didn't get to use the pool as it rained most of the time.
Staff very friendly and helpful
We stayed in a Cabin for 2 nights with our 2 kids. Cabin was modern, well designed and maintained. Location was great and facilities fantastic.
Facilities are spotless, lots of variety of activies for kids of all ages. Staff were lovely
Beautiful Park and lovely receptionist couldn't help us enough 😍

The playground here is sensational and the pool/spa is great for kids. Photos in the ad show beaches and lighthouse, none of which are walkable. Lennox Head or West Ballina is where you go for food. Walls paper thin. Staff are quite pleasant.
Very clean place, and the most important part was that they had a machine that would park your caravan instead of you trying to park in a tight spot. We will definitely stay here again

Staff excellent from office to cleaning and grounds care.A pleasure to stay for months each year. I’m given the same site each year to accommodate my slide off camper. There’s great pickleball in Ballina on top of the beautiful coast-line… and family to catch up with.❤️
Absolutely loved this place beautiful clean cabins wonderful service
Clean and tidy cabin, very friendly staff and a great location - a little ways out of the hustle and bustle of the Ballina town centre.
Great and friendly customer service from Kara  and good coffee :) Ensuite and camp kitchen extremely clean.
Great park...credit to managers

Peaceful environment.
Very clean amenities and pool area.
Nice size van sites that are easy to back into.
It's a little bit out of town, but it's easy to drive into town for supplies.
Stayed with our van. Clean park. Would have been better if not school  holidays very crowded. Over all  would stay again
Very accommodating staff, great facilities and exceptionally clean.

Not bad, fairly clean. Good that there was aircon, not dusty :) Rooms got the job done.  Cabin 1 was very noisy in the morning, lots of trucks, gardeners all sorts. The kitchen didn't have basic cooking ingredients such as salt and oil. Pool table didn't have chalk and only 1 que. Internet worked well :)

We arrived after 5pm (office shuts at 5) without a booking. Kara was so kind and accommodating getting us a site. Offered a drive through site because we were only there for one night, it was great. Lovely park lots to do for families. Very well maintained park also. Could not fault our experience and will be back if we are in the Ballina area again! Thank you Kara, your kindness was so appreciated!!
Clean, modern, quiet, 10 minutes from a beach, great location to drive up to Lennox heads or Byron Bay, or just chill out at the pool. Really friendly staff and excellent facilities.

Just great great service
Very quiet
Bit out of town
We were happy thx
Good service. Great facility for families

Stayed with my family the faculties for kids were great. But the layout for caravan were horrible. How can u cram people so close together. Have hardly any room to do anything. Staff are very lovely though

"We had a fantastic 4-night stay at this beautiful cabin! The moment we walked in, we were impressed by how clean and well-maintained it was. The cabin had everything we needed for a comfortable stay, from air conditioning to keep us cool, to a heated pool for relaxation.

The facilities were top-notch, and we appreciated the attention to detail in providing all the basic amenities. The cabin truly felt like a home away from home.

We would highly recommend this cabin to anyone looking for a peaceful and relaxing getaway. We can't wait to come back!

5/5 stars!"
Beautiful camping site with new facilities that were always clean.
we stayed for one night just before Christmas. the park is lovely and the bathrooms are super clean and well maintained. we enjoyed our stay and wish we could have stayed a bit longer.  thank you.
The 1 bedroom unit was very tidy and the bed super comfortable.

Service was lovely. The receptionist was charming professional and very accommodating. The cabin was very small and had strange smell. Couch not very clean or decent quality. Games room under Reno but I was notified of this in advance
The very best caravan park cabin i have ever been in 100 percent  cabin number 4 and we will be back  congratulations to all who work there  from Dallas
We stayed in a powered site with an ensuite.  Lovely park with large sites and good facilities. About 10 minutes drive to both Ballina and Lennox head.

A powered van site over the busy holiday weekend. This park is an off the radar gem. Clean and excellent amenities block, shady landscaped  surroundings. The park is a credit to the whole team. A nice vibe with lots of families and happy kids. A good midway base Ballina or Lennox, walking or cycling , otherwise a short car trip to either.
Very tidy and clean cabin, will definitely stay here again.

We arrived after hours when it was dark.  (Sept 14) Text from Park had said to collect check-in kit from safe, for which a code was provided.  Text also said there would be instructions on the boom gate code in the kit.  We collected the kit from the safe OK, but couldn’t read the site map in the dark and missed the bit where it said tourism site visitors didn’t need a code to get through the boom gate and could just use the fob on the keyring.  We couldn't work out how to get in.  Finally got through in the wake of another vehicle.  The cabin number - 10 - was written on the site map way up in the corner where the residential sites were.  As a result we went to residential site 10, not tourist site 10, and naturally the key wouldn’t open the door.  We had to call for help three times on the emergency number to find the right cabin and also to sort out the boom gate business. This took about half an hour. The location of the tourist cabin should have been circled on the map, not just written randomly up near the wrong site.. But the emergency helper on duty was very pleasant and patient and helpful, and the cabin was very comfortable.

NOT A PARK FOR ANYONE WITH A TENT!
I booked a powered ensuite sight for my partner's birthday. Looking at previous reviews, we were pretty happy with the spot. However, on our first night, it rained. The weather was not a problem; the issue was that the campsite had 0 undercover areas to shelter or eat our dinner, and the park did not state that half the park amenities were shut down due to maintenance. The park had a community hall, which we ended up finding by looking at the signs however, we got in trouble with the residents as it is not meant to be open to the campers of the park and apparently, there are lines on the floor stating this (that you cannot see in the dark, let alone whilst raining). There are 2 portable BBQs with a small canopy over them. However, the small picnic table next to these is out in the rain. This is the "camp kitchen", with a fridge in the laundry area. We ended up packing up and leaving with our son as the rain was expected to continue all weekend and left late Friday night, dropping our keys at the after-hours key box (which was broken too, no after hours number). Disappointed considering the $ nowadays & I cannot get a refund or cancel unless it's 72 hours prior.

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Big4 Tasmania Holiday Parks (Ballina)! The accommodation was spacious, clean, and very comfortable. We loved the fully equipped kitchen, which made it easy to prepare meals during our stay. The facilities for kids were fantastic—our children had a blast! The pool area was a real highlight for us, with both the pool and the hot spa being incredibly relaxing. We’d highly recommend this park to anyone looking for a family-friendly getaway.
Nice spot and quiet
We stayed in our Caravan nice views and big sites

I have to stay we have enjoyed our 2 night stay which the deluxe cabin included everything we needed such 2 tvs, 2 AC, a washer machine, 2 bunk beds, a full size kitchen and a private room with a queen bed.

I will definitely reconsider coming here again :)

Perfect location. Can walk to the beautiful nearby beach. Not too far from shops if you need to get some groceries.
The residents living there make it quite clear they don’t like visitors despite the fact that’s exactly what it is - a holiday park. Kids get into trouble from the residents for having fun on their holiday.
Cockroaches in our cabin. It’s winter time so it wasn’t down to heat. Nor was it because of us, they were there to greet us on arrival. There was a big spray already in the cabin suggesting they were aware of the issue. Didn’t enjoy getting up for the toilet to find cockroaches crawling the wall and bench top. Apart from them, the cabin was nice. Well presented and ideal size for what we needed.
Pool looked clean but again, it’s winter, I didn’t use it.
Probably wouldn’t go back. It was fine for 3 nights.

This place was lovely. Hot spa is amazing. It rained our whole week but our cabin was clean and comfortable. Staff were so helpful. Also an aviation geek’s dream as it’s under the local airport flight path. Highly recommend staying here, perfect for teens and families.

Very impressed
Enjoyed our stay

I would like to say a big thank you to the person I spoke to today about my booking, I think her name was Kara.
My event is no longer in Ballina and regretfully I had to cancel my booking, the service I received was more than 5 stars. Thank you for making the process easy, I'll be booking directly through you next time.
Thank you 😊

Definitely do not recommend the small cabins, the shower head fell off the shower and hit me in the head and there are no showers other then the one near the sites which has no privacy whatsoever, not that were written on the map anyway. The water just dribbles out. We tried to use the heater on the air conditioner and it does nothing. It’s very run down inside. I don’t recommend booking the smaller cabins if you have a porta cot as the rooms are very small, they won’t fit. I was pretty excited to stay in this park as I always have a great experience with big 4, not this time. I paid way to much for one night to have this experience, thankful I’m leaving tomorrow.

Friendly staff & very helpful.Great park with very lovely clean amenities, & good hot showers.Crystal clear swimming pool.Gardens & lawns kept beautiful by maintenance staff.It's close to everything you need & sight seeing.Beautiful beaches within walking distance & the most gorgeous views.Ballina is a really great place to visit & stay.We enjoyed our stay in the park & will be back.
Fabulous cabin. Thankyou. Very clean and equipped. Quiet location. A walk to Boulder beach. Very handy for both Ballina And Lennox head.

Unfortunately, we were only here for one night. We had a wonderful stay. The campground was one of the nicest on our trip so far. We can only recommend it to anyone. Very friendly staff, well-maintained and modern facilities, lots of options for children. Many thanks for a short but wonderful stay.
Suited to all ages it was clean and relaxing environment
Thank you for the lovely stay.

We don’t recommend this place If you’re looking for a nice place to stay with your family.

I am writing to provide detailed feedback regarding the numerous issues my family and I encountered during our recent stay at Tasman Holiday Parks Ballina. Our experience on sites 119 & 120 from April 2nd to April 6th was nothing short of a nightmare, marred by a series of frustrating incidents and appalling customer service.

Upon our arrival, we were greeted by the receptionist, who, to our dismay, turned out to be the manager of the park. Her sour demeanor set a negative tone from the outset. Despite our attempts to remain optimistic, the problems began almost immediately. When we attempted to hook up to our power station, we discovered that only one out of the four power spots worked. We promptly informed the receptionist-cum-manager, who callously brushed off our concerns and promised to send the groundsman to investigate.

The groundsman's response was equally disappointing. Upon his arrival, he offered no solution and merely suggested that we plug our cord into the side of the ensuite, with the assurance that an electrician would be dispatched the following day. This lack of urgency and accountability was infuriating, especially considering the inconvenience it caused us.

The next day, when we inquired about the status of the electrical issue, we were met with indifference and ignorance from the receptionist-cum-manager. It was only when we insisted on speaking to her again that any action was taken. However, the encounter with her and the groundsman was nothing short of insulting. They rudely informed us that the power station we had attempted to use was only intended for one power point and accused us of being "greedy." This condescending attitude was utterly unacceptable and left us feeling belittled and disrespected.

Furthermore, we brought to their attention the malfunctioning light switch in ensuite 120 and the stuck door handle in ensuite 119. Their response to this was they are fine. Rather than addressing these legitimate concerns, the manager hastily dismissed them without offering any solutions. This lack of attention to detail and disregard for guest comfort was appalling and indicative of the overall poor management of the park.

Then, the next day, with all the rain we had experienced over the past few days, we needed to use the washing machines. To our dismay, we discovered that only one out of the four washing machines was in order, and the other three were out of order. Despite our attempts to do laundry, the one functioning machine stopped working halfway through the load, leaving our belongings trapped inside. When my husband went to inform the receptionist-cum-manager, she called the groundsman (her husband) and had her phone on speaker. Upon hearing that the only working washing machine had now also malfunctioned, he responded with profanity and frustration. This unprofessional behaviour was deeply disappointing and added to our already considerable frustration.

Throughout our stay, it became increasingly clear that the management of Tasman Holiday Parks Ballina prioritised the needs of permanent residents over those of paying guests. This attitude is not only disrespectful but also detrimental to the reputation of the park.

Have absolutely enjoyed our stay here for the 3rd time. Staff here are very friendly and the cabins are spotless. The pool and other facilities are super clean. Has a great games room and playground for children. The park is well maintained and people are so friendly.
Special mention to the manager Cathryn- You are an absolute gem ! The nicest lady you will ever meet such a beautiful and kind human being. So attentive and you made our stay enjoyable. Can’t wait to revisit next summer.  Thank you to the staff and yourself you guys do an amazing job at the park God Bless you all ❤️

Gabrielle & Paul

Wife n I have been coming here for about two years we will continue to do so as it has become an annual ritual for us .great place , clean , friendly locals and also the manager Cathryn there is an absolute gem 💎 she is a very genuine kindhearted soul .God bless her

Perfect location in the middle of Ballina Lennox Heads and Byron Bay
Park beautifully maintained
Awesome amenities
Amazing pool
Staff beautiful
Luv kuv luv

Nice people, nice place and well placed,  near beaches and coastal walks. Great spot for Caravans, MotorHomes and even Tents. Lots of amenities, such as BBQ's, tables and seating and a pool to suit almost everyone.

Ample great facilities (toilets and showers) and a well kept campground. Toilets are a bit far from the tents section (sites 1-10) which is a but of a nightmare in the rain, would be good if there were some closer ones for tent accomodation. Nice walk to boulder beach from campsite, easy to get to, and not far. Camp kitchen kettle could do with a good clean.
Great place for a seaside getaway.
Great camping spot with a very nice pool and good facilities for younger kids. Excellent wifi.  Got a good deal via the website.

Stopped for a night in our travels. Was given a large grass corner power site, no 103. Convenient to ablutions and very quiet. This caravan park appears to be much more secure from theft as opposed to those directly on the beaches.|To be clear, the caravan park is at Skennars Head, which is outside of the main Ballina area, and it is close to Lennox Heads. It is set back a short walking distance from the beaches. One can walk or cycle from the caravan park to Boulder Beach (go straight across the road) and get onto the coastal trail walk, which is well worth doing if one stays there.|The ablutions were very clean and modern, and there is a camp kitchen, as well as a pool there.|
We loved our stay! Great for kids and the location was great in that it was easy access to the beach and nice walks to Lennox Head.
Sehr gute und große saubere Bungalows. Der Standort optimal,nicht weit vom Strand und City.
One of the best I have stayed at .Beautiful little park well catered for the children.  Spotless amenities . Very lovely staff could not fault anything. 👍

The lady who greeted us, Cathryn, is a legend. She was happy, joyful, an advocate for her area and really just a nice lady. There was an activity pack for our kids on arrival (which is amazing as you set up), the site was level and flat and you are given a map of the local area.

One of the best play areas we have seen and a heated spa.
Good

We had a lovely 2 night stay on our road trip from Brisbane to Sydney.
Cabin was nice with a good pool area. Quite a basic park, no bells and whistles but the good basics for a small park.
Location-wise was a bit out of the way, had to drive everywhere.

We've just returned from a weekend stay and it was wonderful!

The garden view from cabin 8 was lovely and it was just a short distance from the pool and spa.

The cabin was a spacious 2 bedrooms, and we really enjoyed the verandah. It had full kitchen facilities and heaps of storage. Beds and lounge were all comfy!

This park had SO much for the kids to do. Pool/spa, kids area with table tennis, pool table, cinema room, games, reading area, big chess, playground and jumping pillow. There was also go-kart hire, which was a massive hit with my 3 kids. They wanted to stay in the park more than sightseeing!!

The staff were so lovely and went above and beyond for us a few times.

We had a fantastic stay and couldn't fault it at all. Thankyou to the whole team=)

Very tidy park with immaculate amenities, even a make-up mirror for the ladies.  Smaller park for tourist vans (larger resident area doesn't impact at all),  some sites a bit tight.  Quiet park but with occasional low overhead plane noise.  A bit of a drive to Ballina and Lennox Head.
Great experience, will be back

Don't really want to share how wonderful this place is as i'd love to keep it a secret but I won't be selfish.
This place is amazing! Staff are extremely helpful. Park is neat and tidy. Sites are good size. Drive thru sites available. Swimming pool with a heated spa attached. Convenient little shop, great for when you forget the milk. Close to supermarket, walk to beach and fantastic walkways and cycle paths, close to Ballina and Lennox Head.
Great service, great facilities, perfect location!! I'll be back!!

Beautiful, most definitely stay there again.
The grounds are very neat n tidy, great pool & spa.... Bar BQ n kitchen for the campers etc 5 stars⭐
Clean rooms

Clean, great location, friendly staff. Amenities spotless
Will be back

Amazing service. Was a last minute thing. Staff was very helpful.
And it's a quick walk from Amazing views of boulder Rock. Wear we seen whales 🐋

This park is so well maintained, stayed here back in 2011 as well as 2023 and never lets me down. Ensuite sites as well as drive though and slab powered sites. Stayed on a powered site this trip and the amenities are modern and clean. The pool area is lovely as well. Only 10 mins to Ballina and short drive to lookouts and beaches the coastal walking path that is suitable for walking and cycling.

Great quite park.  Need to drive to beach, but not far.  We had an ensuite site and it was clean, tidy and plenty of space for both van/car.|June/July is a great time to stop along any of the spots along the coastline to catch some whales passing by on their way up North.  Short drives to Lennox Heads or Bryon Bay.

This is our 2nd stay at this great little park.|Firstly the staff are so friendly and accommodating you feel at home. |They just want to help in anyway they can. The lady even reopened the shop for me to have an ice-cream snack.|We stayed 2 nights in a powered ensuite site. I just love these cute little ensuites.|The site itself was great and flat so parking was no problem.|The camp kitchen has 2 2 burner hotplates an oven microwave kettle toaster and 3 outdoor BBQs.|All were very clean. The pool and spa were inviting but still a little cold for us in July.|Overall great stay.
One of the best sites we have stayrd in on our 6 week trip. Book marked as i will be back.
Comfortable cabin with all amenities. Good parking. Friendly, helpful staff. Quiet location. Secure access. About 7.5 km north of Ballina towards Lennox Head. Would stay there again.
Just got here check later been here before loved it then
